---
title: Motards sur la route de Valloire, vers Chablis
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784733608/motardschablis_20240712_prvztp.png
description: Motards sur la route de Valloire, vers Chablis
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2024-07-12
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![]( https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784733608/motardschablis_20240712_prvztp.png)
